# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cicd security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  PIP_REQUIRE_HASHES: "true"
  PIP_NO_CACHE_DIR: "true"

test:
  stage: test
  image: python:3.11-slim
  before_script:
    - pip install --require-hashes -r requirements.txt
  script:
    - python -m pytest tests/ --junitxml=report.xml
  artifacts:
    reports:
      junit: report.xml

lint:
  stage: test
  image: python:3.11-slim
  before_script:
    - pip install --require-hashes -r requirements-dev.txt
  script:
    - python -m flake8 src/
    - python -m bandit -r src/

build:
  stage: build
  image: docker:24-dind
  services:
    - docker:24-dind
  variables:
    DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR: "/certs"
  before_script:
    - docker login -u "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" -p "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" "$CI_REGISTRY"
  script:
    - docker build --pull --no-cache -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA" .
    - docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA"
  only:
    - main

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:3.18
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | ssh-add -
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - echo "$SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS" > ~/.ssh/known_hosts
    - chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - ssh deploy@staging.example.com "docker pull $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA && docker-compose -f /opt/app/docker-compose.yml up -d"
  only:
    - main

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:3.18
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://example.com
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY_PROD" | ssh-add -
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - echo "$SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS_PROD" > ~/.ssh/known_hosts
    - chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - ssh deploy@production.example.com "docker pull $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA && docker-compose -f /opt/app/docker-compose.yml up -d"
  only:
    - main
  when: manual
  allow_failure: false

# NOTE: This pipeline requires requirements.txt and requirements-dev.txt
# to include pinned versions with hashes. Generate them using:
#   pip-compile --generate-hashes requirements.in -o requirements.txt
#   pip-compile --generate-hashes requirements-dev.in -o requirements-dev.txt
#
# Example requirements.txt entry:
#   pytest==7.4.3 \
#     --hash=sha256:0d009c083ea859a71b76adf7c1d502e4bc170b80a8ef002da5806527b9591fac
#
# This ensures reproducible builds and protects against dependency confusion
# and supply chain attacks by verifying package integrity.
